OS/OW Permit Bot
Your oversize load dispatch assistant
🚛 How to request a permit
1
Tap GET PERMIT
Use the pinned button at the top of the group chat — it opens the permit form directly.
2
Fill in load details
Enter commodity, dimensions, weight and route.
Width Height Length — tap Legal or type custom value.
3
Submit — done! ✅
Dispatch receives your request instantly and will process it shortly.
⚡ What else I can do
❓
State Restrictions
Ask about curfews, escorts & max dimensions in any state
📋
Full Form
Axle weights, preferred route, overweight breakdowns
⚡
Instant Delivery
Request goes to dispatch in seconds, 24/7
📌
Always Available
Pinned button — one tap from anywhere in the chat
💬 Example questions
"I am12 wide in Indiana. Can i travel 24/7?"
"Max width without escort in Florida?"
"Is travel allowed on GA highways Saturday?"
Message the bot privately and ask anything about OS/OW regulations.
